creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org is skipped as it points to one or more of the pkg0.* hosts. That leaves 5 hosts.

Could be that for some reason the query in my last comment only returned 4 hosts (on your end) or that one was simply so slow that it timed out.

My next update (happening some time during the holidays) will have a better timeout handling (including a switch).

Stay tuned :-)
